series_metadata.series_description: The BWC Tables of Organization (T.O.) are diagrams that show the reporting structure of employees in the agency. The T.O. shows the BWC Divisions, Departments, Sections, Units, employee job classification, employee name, working titles, work locations, and position numbers of the employees. Reference General Schedule GP-O-01.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded. The current chart will be audited by Auditor of State. ; Paper: Retain until superseded. The current chart will be audited by Auditor of State., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
